'''thowafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yallar|yallar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yallar|yallar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thowafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowafithi|thowafithi]] || [[word:thowafiji|thowafiji]] || [[word:thowafishi|thowafishi]] || [[word:thowafiki|thowafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowafuthuthu|thowafuthuthu]] || [[word:thowafujuju|thowafujuju]] || [[word:thowafushushu|thowafushushu]] || [[word:thowafukuku|thowafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafuthu|thowafuthu]] || [[word:thowafuju|thowafuju]] || [[word:thowafushu|thowafushu]] || [[word:thowafuku|thowafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafufthuf|thowafufthuf]] || [[word:thowafufjuf|thowafufjuf]] || [[word:thowafufshuf|thowafufshuf]] || [[word:thowafufkuf|thowafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowafethe|thowafethe]] || [[word:thowafeje|thowafeje]] || [[word:thowafeshe|thowafeshe]] || [[word:thowafeke|thowafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowafothotho|thowafothotho]] || [[word:thowafojojo|thowafojojo]] || [[word:thowafoshosho|thowafoshosho]] || [[word:thowafokoko|thowafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafotho|thowafotho]] || [[word:thowafojo|thowafojo]] || [[word:thowafosho|thowafosho]] || [[word:thowafoko|thowafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafofthof|thowafofthof]] || [[word:thowafofjof|thowafofjof]] || [[word:thowafofshof|thowafofshof]] || [[word:thowafofkof|thowafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfthĂŻf|thowafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfjĂŻf|thowafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfshĂŻf|thowafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfkĂŻf|thowafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thowafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thowafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thowafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thowafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfthĂŻf|thowafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfjĂŻf|thowafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfshĂŻf|thowafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfkĂŻf|thowafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfthĂŻf|thowafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfjĂŻf|thowafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfshĂŻf|thowafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thowafĂŻfkĂŻf|thowafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowafĂŠthĂŠ|thowafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thowafĂŠjĂŠ|thowafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thowafĂŠshĂŠ|thowafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thowafĂŠkĂŠ|thowafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowafathatha|thowafathatha]] || [[word:thowafajaja|thowafajaja]] || [[word:thowafashasha|thowafashasha]] || [[word:thowafakaka|thowafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafatha|thowafatha]] || [[word:thowafaja|thowafaja]] || [[word:thowafasha|thowafasha]] || [[word:thowafaka|thowafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafafthaf|thowafafthaf]] || [[word:thowafafjaf|thowafafjaf]] || [[word:thowafafshaf|thowafafshaf]] || [[word:thowafafkaf|thowafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thowafasha|thowafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowafshĂ«sha|thowafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowafrosha|thowafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowafmusha|thowafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowafyasha|thowafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowafnkshĂ«sha|gothowafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowafnkrosha|gothowafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowafnkmusha|gothowafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowafnkyasha|gothowafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thowawafasha|thowawafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowawafshĂ«sha|thowawafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowawafrosha|thowawafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowawafmusha|thowawafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowawafyasha|thowawafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowawafnkshĂ«sha|gothowawafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowawafnkrosha|gothowawafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowawafnkmusha|gothowawafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowawafnkyasha|gothowawafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thewĂŠfasha|thewĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thewĂŠfshĂ«sha|thewĂŠfshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thewĂŠfrosha|thewĂŠfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thewĂŠfmusha|thewĂŠfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thewĂŠfyasha|thewĂŠfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothewĂŠfnkshĂ«sha|gothewĂŠfnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothewĂŠfnkrosha|gothewĂŠfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothewĂŠfnkmusha|gothewĂŠfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothewĂŠfnkyasha|gothewĂŠfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thowfafasha|thowfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowfafshĂ«sha|thowfafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowfafrosha|thowfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowfafmusha|thowfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowfafyasha|thowfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowfafnkshĂ«sha|gothowfafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowfafnkrosha|gothowfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowfafnkmusha|gothowfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowfafnkyasha|gothowfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
